# FramesCLI JSON Schemas

<!-- Code generated by ./scripts/generate-schemas.sh; DO NOT EDIT. -->
This directory contains generated agent-facing contract artifacts.

## Source of Truth

- `internal/contracts/mcp.go`: MCP tool registry and tool-level metadata
- `internal/contracts/inputs.go`: MCP request types shared by runtime decoding and schema generation
- `internal/contracts/schema_reflect.go`: schema derivation from the real request types
- `internal/contracts/schemas.go`: shared schema definitions for generated docs

## Generated Files

- `README.md`: this generated human-readable reference
- `cli-response-envelope.json`: common automation envelope used by most `--json` CLI commands and MCP tool payloads
- `mcp-tools.json`: machine-readable MCP tool inventory from the registry, including input schemas and emitted envelope command names

## MCP Tool Inventory

### `doctor`

Check local toolchain readiness for FramesCLI

- Envelope `command`: `doctor`
- Input fields: none

### `preview`

Dry-run output estimate for a video input (defaults to recent when omitted)

- Envelope `command`: `preview`
- Input fields:
  - `input` (string)
  - `fps` (number >= 0 or string (auto))
  - `format` (string)
  - `mode` (string)
  - `preset` (string)
  - `chunk_duration` (integer)

### `extract`

Run single-video extraction workflow (input defaults to recent, or use url for remote videos)

- Envelope `command`: `extract`
- Input fields:
  - `input` (string)
  - `url` (string)
  - `no_cache` (boolean)
  - `fps` (number >= 0 or string (auto))
  - `voice` (boolean)
  - `format` (string)
  - `out` (string)
  - `hwaccel` (string)
  - `preset` (string)
  - `from` (string)
  - `to` (string)
  - `frame_start` (integer)
  - `frame_end` (integer)
  - `every_n` (integer)
  - `name_template` (string)
  - `chunk_duration` (integer)
  - `allow_expensive` (boolean)
  - `transcribe_backend` (string)
  - `transcribe_bin` (string)
  - `transcribe_language` (string)

### `extract_batch`

Run extraction for multiple inputs/globs (falls back to configured agent_input_dirs)

- Envelope `command`: `extract-batch`
- Input fields:
  - `inputs` (array<string>)
  - `fps` (number >= 0 or string (auto))
  - `voice` (boolean)
  - `format` (string)
  - `preset` (string)
  - `chunk_duration` (integer)
  - `allow_expensive` (boolean)
  - `transcribe_backend` (string)
  - `transcribe_bin` (string)
  - `transcribe_language` (string)

### `open_last`

Resolve path for artifact from most recent run

- Envelope `command`: `open-last`
- Input fields:
  - `root` (string)
  - `artifact` (string)

### `get_latest_artifacts`

Return paths for available artifacts from the most recent run

- Envelope `command`: `get_latest_artifacts`
- Input fields:
  - `root` (string)

### `get_run_artifacts`

Return indexed artifacts for the latest, a specific run, or a recent run list

- Envelope `command`: `get_run_artifacts`
- Input fields:
  - `root` (string)
  - `run` (string)
  - `recent` (integer)

### `transcribe_run`

Resume transcription for an existing run directory

- Envelope `command`: `transcribe_run`
- Input fields:
  - `run_dir` (string) required
  - `chunk_duration` (integer)

### `prefs_get`

Get agent path preferences for input and output roots

- Envelope `command`: `prefs_get`
- Input fields: none

### `prefs_set`

Persist agent path preferences for input and output roots

- Envelope `command`: `prefs_set`
- Input fields:
  - `input_dirs` (array<string>)
  - `output_root` (string)

## Notes

- `docs/AGENT_INTEGRATION.md` is the canonical hand-written overview; files in this directory are generated contract references
- `doctor --json` is a separate doctor report shape and is intentionally not described by `cli-response-envelope.json`
- Re-run `./scripts/generate-schemas.sh` after editing the contract registry
- `go test ./cmd/frames -run TestGeneratedAgentContractArtifactsAreCurrent` fails when these generated files drift
